    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O R S T V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    AbstractButton - Class in view.controls
    Abstract base class for creating uniformly styled JButtons with an optional action callback.
    AbstractButton(String, Runnable) - Constructor for class view.controls.AbstractButton
    Constructs a new AbstractButton with the given label and action.
    AbstractCollection<DataT> - Class in model
    Abstract data model that provides the tools to manage a collection of AbstractData items.
    AbstractCollection() - Constructor for class model.AbstractCollection
     
    AbstractCollectionPage<CollectionT, DataT> - Class in view.pages
    Base class for pages that display a list of data items inside a scrollable view.
    AbstractCollectionPage(CollectionT) - Constructor for class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Creates a new collection page that observes the given data collection.
    AbstractData - Class in model
    Abstract base class for data models that support observation and serialization.
    AbstractData() - Constructor for class model.AbstractData
     
    AbstractDataPanel<DataT> - Class in view.panels
    Abstract panel that displays and interacts with a specific AbstractData object.
    AbstractDataPanel(DataT, IDataPanelListener<DataT>) - Constructor for class view.panels.AbstractDataPanel
    Constructs a new AbstractDataPanel, registering event options and handling null checks on the provided controller.
    AbstractDialog<DataT> - Class in view.dialogs
    Abstract base class for creating modal dialogs that edit or manipulate a specific type of data.
    AbstractDialog(String, DataT, JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    Constructs a new AbstractDialog.
    AbstractTitleEditDialog<DataT> - Class in view.dialogs
    Abstract base class for dialogs that allow the user to edit an AbstractData object.
    AbstractTitleEditDialog(String, DataT, JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Constructs a new edit dialog for the specified data.
    AbstractView<DataT> - Class in view
    An abstract view component that observes an AbstractData object.
    AbstractView(DataT) - Constructor for class view.AbstractView
    Constructs a new AbstractView, setting up its observer relationship with the provided data.
    action - Variable in class view.controls.AbstractButton
    The action to invoke when the button is clicked.
    add(DataT) - Method in class model.AbstractCollection
    Adds an item to the collection and notifies observers.
    AddButton - Class in view.controls
    Specialized AbstractButton that displays a "plus" symbol.
    AddButton(Runnable) - Constructor for class view.controls.AddButton
    Constructs a new AddButton with the given action.
    addOption(String, Runnable) - Method in class view.controls.OptionsMenu
    Adds a new labeled option to this menu.
    App - Class in Unnamed Package
    The main application class that initializes the entire program.
    AppController - Class in controller
    The central controller for the ToDo Master application.
    AppController(Workspace) - Constructor for class controller.AppController
    Constructs a new AppController to control the provided workspace.
    auxiliaries - package auxiliaries
     

    B

    BackButton - Class in view.controls
    Specialized AbstractButton that displays a "back" arrow symbol.
    BackButton(Runnable) - Constructor for class view.controls.BackButton
    Constructs a new BackButton with the given action.
    bottomControlPanel - Variable in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    The bottom control panel that can contain bottom action controls.
    buildContentPanel() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    Creates the content panel for the dialog.
    buildContentPanel() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Creates the main content panel, which contains a title input panel.
    buildContentPanel() - Method in class view.dialogs.CreateChecklistDialog
    Creates the main content panel, which contains a title input panel.
    buildContentPanel() - Method in class view.dialogs.DeleteDataDialog
    Builds the content panel for the dialog.
    buildContentPanel() - Method in class view.dialogs.EditTaskDialog
    Builds the content panel by assembling the title input, priority options, details panel, and deadline panel.
    buildContentPanel() - Method in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Creates the scrollable center panel containing all data panels.
    buildContentPanel() - Method in class view.pages.ChecklistPage
    Builds the content area that displays tasks.
    buildDataPanel(DataT) - Method in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Subclasses must implement this to create a panel for a single data item.
    buildDataPanel(Checklist) - Method in class view.pages.WorkspacePage
    Creates and returns a ChecklistPanel to display the checklist and provide item-level interactions.
    buildDataPanel(Task) - Method in class view.pages.ChecklistPage
    Constructs a data panel for each displayed task based on the current display mode.
    buildDataPanelContainer(LayoutManager) - Method in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Creates a panel container with the given layout and fills it with all data panels.
    buildStripePanel() - Method in class view.panels.AbstractDataPanel
    Creates a narrow vertical stripe panel for visual accent or separation purposes.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.AbstractView
    Builds the user interface components for this view.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.controls.AbstractButton
    Sets up the button's appearance and behavior.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.controls.EnumButton
    Sets up the button's appearance and behavior.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    Builds the dialog's user interface.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Builds the user interface and pre-fills the title input field with the current data's title.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Builds the user interface structure: Sets the layout and background, then constructs and adds the header, content, and bottom panels.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.panels.AbstractDataPanel
    Sets up the visual layout and interactive behavior of this data panel.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.panels.ChecklistPanel
    Builds the graphical components of the panel, setting up a horizontal layout with: Stripe panels for visual decoration The checklist title label The completion label showing checklist status An options menu button for edit and delete actions
    buildUI() - Method in class view.panels.TaskCardPanel
    Builds all graphical components of the panel.
    buildUI() - Method in class view.panels.TaskTextPanel
    Constructs the user interface elements: Creates and styles the title label. Sets up tooltip and mouse listeners.
    BY_DEADLINE - Enum constant in enum class auxiliaries.TaskSorter.Mode
     
    BY_IMPORTANCE - Enum constant in enum class auxiliaries.TaskSorter.Mode
     
    BY_PRIORITY - Enum constant in enum class auxiliaries.TaskSorter.Mode
     

    C

    cancelButton - Variable in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    The "Cancel" button that closes the dialog without confirming.
    CARDS - Enum constant in enum class model.Checklist.DisplayMode
     
    Checklist - Class in model
    Defines a checklist that can contain multiple Task items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
    Checklist() - Constructor for class model.Checklist
    Creates an empty checklist.
    Checklist(JSONObject) - Constructor for class model.Checklist
    Creates a checklist from a JSON object.
    Checklist.DisplayMode - Enum Class in model
     
    ChecklistPage - Class in view.pages
    Defines a page that displays and manages a Checklist, showing its associated Tasks either as cards or as text.
    ChecklistPage(ChecklistPageController) - Constructor for class view.pages.ChecklistPage
    Creates a new ChecklistPage linked to the given controller.
    ChecklistPageController - Class in controller
    Controller for the checklist page in the ToDo Master application by implementing the IChecklistPageListener interface.
    ChecklistPageController(AppController) - Constructor for class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Constructs a new ChecklistPageController.
    ChecklistPanel - Class in view.panels
    Defines a panel that visually represents a Checklist object.
    ChecklistPanel(Checklist, WorkspacePageController) - Constructor for class view.panels.ChecklistPanel
    Constructs a new ChecklistPanel.
    clear() - Method in class model.AbstractCollection
    Removes all items from the collection and notifies observers.
    ClearCollectionDialog<CollectionT, DataT> - Class in view.dialogs
    Defines a confirmation dialog for clearing all contents of a collection.
    ClearCollectionDialog(CollectionT, JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.ClearCollectionDialog
    Constructs a new ClearCollectionDialog.
    confirmButton - Variable in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    The "Confirm" button that commits the action associated with this dialog.
    contentPanel - Variable in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    The content area that contains panels for each data item.
    controller - package controller
     
    controller - Variable in class view.panels.AbstractDataPanel
    The controller that handles user actions such as edit, delete, and selection events.
    controller.contracts - package controller.contracts
     
    CreateChecklistDialog - Class in view.dialogs
    Defines a dialog for creating a new Checklist.
    CreateChecklistDialog(JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.CreateChecklistDialog
    Constructs a CreateChecklistDialog.
    CreateTaskDialog - Class in view.dialogs
    Defines a dialog for creating a new Task.
    CreateTaskDialog(JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.CreateTaskDialog
    Constructs a new CreateTaskDialog.
    createToolTip() - Method in class view.panels.TaskTextPanel
    Returns a JToolTip with a custom border.

    D

    dataPanels - Variable in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    The list of data panels displayed inside the content area.
    dataToWorkWith - Variable in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    The data object that this dialog will manipulate.
    deadlineMissed() - Method in class model.Task
    Checks if the task missed its deadline.
    DeleteDataDialog<DataT> - Class in view.dialogs
    Defines a confirmation dialog for deleting data entities.
    DeleteDataDialog(DataT, JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.DeleteDataDialog
    Constructs a new DeleteDataDialog.

    E

    EditTaskDialog - Class in view.dialogs
    Defines a dialog for editing an existing Task in the application.
    EditTaskDialog(Task, JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.EditTaskDialog
    Constructs a new EditTaskDialog for the given task.
    EnumButton<OptionT> - Class in view.controls
    Specialized MenuButton that displays all constants of a given Enum in its OptionsMenu.
    EnumButton(String, Class<OptionT>, Consumer<OptionT>) - Constructor for class view.controls.EnumButton
    Constructs a new EnumButton with the given label, enumeration type, and action.

    F

    fillControlPanels() - Method in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Subclasses must add controls or components to the header and bottom panels as desired.
    fillControlPanels() - Method in class view.pages.ChecklistPage
    Populates the top and bottom control panels with: Navigation and action buttons in the header (back, menu options). Sorting and add-item controls in the bottom panel. Options include renaming the checklist, clearing all tasks, toggling display mode, and deleting the checklist.
    fillControlPanels() - Method in class view.pages.WorkspacePage
    Fills the top and bottom control panels with components and options specific to workspaces: Displays the workspace title aligned to the left. Provides a menu button in the header with options to rename the workspace and clear all items. Provides an add button in the bottom panel to create new checklists.
    fillInInitialData() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Sets the title input field's text to the current title of the data object.
    fillInInitialData() - Method in class view.dialogs.EditTaskDialog
    Fills the interactive UI components with the task's existing title, details, priority, and deadline.
    FontLoader - Class in auxiliaries
    Utility class for loading and providing font families consisting of regular, bold, italic, and bold-italic styles.
    FontLoader() - Constructor for class auxiliaries.FontLoader
     

    G

    getCreationDateTime() - Method in class model.Task
    Returns the creation date time of the task.
    getDeadline() - Method in class model.Task
    Returns the deadline of the task or null if none
    getDetails() - Method in class model.Task
    Returns the task's additional details.
    getDisplayMode() - Method in class model.Checklist
    Returns the current display mode of the checklist.
    getEditedData() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Applies any edits made in the dialog back to the data object and returns it.
    getEditedData() - Method in class view.dialogs.CreateChecklistDialog
    Applies any edits made in the dialog back to the data object and returns it.
    getEditedData() - Method in class view.dialogs.EditTaskDialog
    Applies any edits made in the dialog back to the data object and returns it.
    getFont(String, int, float) - Static method in class auxiliaries.FontLoader
    Retrieves the specified font style and size for the named font family.
    getInstance() - Static method in class App
    Retrieves the singleton instance of the App.
    getItemCount() - Method in class model.AbstractCollection
    Returns the number of items in the collection.
    getItems() - Method in class model.AbstractCollection
    Returns the list of items managed by this collection.
    getMenu() - Method in class view.controls.MenuButton
    Returns the OptionsMenu attached to this MenuButton
    getNumberOfOpenTasks() - Method in class model.Checklist
    Counts the number of tasks in the checklist that are still unfinished.
    getObservedData() - Method in class view.AbstractView
    Returns the data object this view is observing.
    getPriority() - Method in class model.Task
    Returns the priority of the task.
    getTasksSortedBy(TaskSorter.Mode, List<Task>) - Static method in class auxiliaries.TaskSorter
    Returns a new list of tasks sorted by the given sort property.
    getTitle() - Method in class model.AbstractData
    Returns the title of this data object.
    getWindow() - Method in class controller.AppController
    Returns the main application JFrame window.
    getWorkspace() - Method in class controller.AppController
    Returns the Workspace data observed by the Workspace Page.

    H

    headerControlPanel - Variable in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    The top control panel that can contain header controls like a title label or buttons.
    HIGH - Enum constant in enum class model.Task.Priority
     

    I

    IChecklistPageListener - Interface in controller.contracts
    Defines a listener interface for handling user interactions on a checklist page.
    ICollectionPageListener - Interface in controller.contracts
    Defines a listener interface for handling user actions on a collection page, such as renaming the collection's title, adding new items, or clearing all items.
    IDataPanelListener<DataT> - Interface in controller.contracts
    Defines a listener interface for responding to user actions on a data panel that displays or manages AbstractData items.
    IObservable - Interface in model.contracts
    Defines a contract for observable objects which can notify their registered IObservers about changes, following the Observer design pattern.
    IObserver - Interface in view.contracts
    Defines a contract for observer classes that wish to be notified when the observed model has changed, following the Observer design pattern.
    isDone() - Method in class model.Task
    Returns whether the task is marked as done.
    ISerializable - Interface in model.contracts
    Defines a contract for model classes that can be serialized to JSON, demanding them to provide a method to convert their internal state into a JSONObject, supporting data persistence between runs.
    items - Variable in class model.AbstractCollection
    The list of items managed by this collection.
    IWorkspacePageListener - Interface in controller.contracts
    Defines an alias of ICollectionPageListener for handling user interactions on the workspace page.

    J

    JsonFileStorage - Class in auxiliaries
    Utility class for persisting and retrieving Workspace data to and from a JSON file on disk.
    JsonFileStorage() - Constructor for class auxiliaries.JsonFileStorage
     

    L

    LEXICOGRAPHIC - Enum constant in enum class auxiliaries.TaskSorter.Mode
     
    loadFamily(String) - Static method in class auxiliaries.FontLoader
    Loads all four variants (regular, bold, italic, bold-italic) for the specified font family name.
    loadWorkspaceData() - Static method in class auxiliaries.JsonFileStorage
    Loads the workspace data either from an external file if present, or from the bundled resource otherwise.
    LOW - Enum constant in enum class model.Task.Priority
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
     
    Main - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Main() - Constructor for class Main
     
    MEDIUM - Enum constant in enum class model.Task.Priority
     
    menu - Variable in class view.controls.MenuButton
    The popup menu that will be displayed when this button is clicked.
    MenuButton - Class in view.controls
    A button that, when clicked, displays an OptionsMenu as a popup anchored to the bottom-right of the button.
    MenuButton(String, OptionsMenu) - Constructor for class view.controls.MenuButton
    Constructs a new MenuButton with the given label and an optional menu.
    model - package model
     
    model.contracts - package model.contracts
     

    N

    notifyObservers() - Method in class model.AbstractData
    Notifies all registered observers of a change or event.
    notifyObservers() - Method in interface model.contracts.IObservable
    Notifies all registered observers of a change or event.

    O

    observedData - Variable in class view.AbstractView
    The data object that this view is observing.
    OLDEST_FIRST - Enum constant in enum class auxiliaries.TaskSorter.Mode
     
    onAddNewItemRequested() - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Displays a dialog to create a new task.
    onAddNewItemRequested() - Method in interface controller.contracts.ICollectionPageListener
    Called when the user requests to add a new item to the current collection.
    onAddNewItemRequested() - Method in class controller.WorkspacePageController
    Displays a dialog to create a new checklist.
    onBackButtonPressed() - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Navigates back to the workspace page.
    onBackButtonPressed() - Method in interface controller.contracts.IChecklistPageListener
    Called when the user presses a "back" button on the checklist page, indicating that they want to navigate back to the workspace page.
    onClearRequested() - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Displays a confirmation dialog to clear all tasks in the checklist.
    onClearRequested() - Method in interface controller.contracts.ICollectionPageListener
    Called when the user requests to clear all items in the current collection.
    onClearRequested() - Method in class controller.WorkspacePageController
    Displays a confirmation dialog to clear all checklists in the workspace.
    onClick() - Method in class view.controls.AbstractButton
    Handles the button's click event by invoking the assigned Runnable action if present.
    onClick() - Method in class view.controls.EnumButton
    Displays the options menu as a popup positioned directly above this button.
    onClick() - Method in class view.controls.MenuButton
    Handles the click event for this button.
    onDeleteItemRequested(DataT) - Method in interface controller.contracts.IDataPanelListener
    Called when the user requests to delete the specified data item.
    onDeleteItemRequested(Checklist) - Method in class controller.WorkspacePageController
    Displays a confirmation dialog to delete the specified checklist.
    onDeleteItemRequested(Task) - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Displays a confirmation dialog to delete a specific task.
    onDeleteListRequested(Checklist) - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Displays a confirmation dialog to delete the given checklist.
    onDeleteListRequested(Checklist) - Method in interface controller.contracts.IChecklistPageListener
    Called when the user requests to delete the entire checklist.
    onDisplayModeToggled() - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Toggles the checklist's display mode between simple flowing text view and card panel view.
    onDisplayModeToggled() - Method in interface controller.contracts.IChecklistPageListener
    Called when the user toggles the checklist's display mode (e.g. showing all tasks vs. only incomplete tasks).
    onEditItemRequested(DataT) - Method in interface controller.contracts.IDataPanelListener
    Called when the user requests to edit the specified data item.
    onEditItemRequested(Checklist) - Method in class controller.WorkspacePageController
    Displays a dialog allowing the user to rename the given checklist.
    onEditItemRequested(Task) - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Displays a dialog to edit the specified task's details.
    onItemSelected(DataT) - Method in interface controller.contracts.IDataPanelListener
    Called when the user selects the specified data item.
    onItemSelected(Checklist) - Method in class controller.WorkspacePageController
    Handles the event when a checklist is selected.
    onItemSelected(Task) - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Toggles the completion status of the selected task and refreshes the checklist page.
    onNotify() - Method in class view.AbstractView
    Called when the observed data notifies this view of a change.
    onNotify() - Method in interface view.contracts.IObserver
    Defines all actions to react with when the observed object notifies.
    onRenameTitleRequested() - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Displays a dialog to rename the checklist title.
    onRenameTitleRequested() - Method in interface controller.contracts.ICollectionPageListener
    Called when the user requests to rename the title of the current collection.
    onRenameTitleRequested() - Method in class controller.WorkspacePageController
    Displays a dialog to rename the current workspace.
    onSortModeChosen(TaskSorter.Mode) - Method in class controller.ChecklistPageController
    Sets the sort mode for the checklist's tasks.
    onSortModeChosen(TaskSorter.Mode) - Method in interface controller.contracts.IChecklistPageListener
    Called when the user chooses a new sort mode for the checklist's tasks.
    options - Variable in class view.AbstractView
    Context or options menu associated with this view.
    OptionsMenu - Class in view.controls
    A simple popup menu that contains a list of selectable options, displayed as JMenuItems separated by vertical spacing.
    OptionsMenu() - Constructor for class view.controls.OptionsMenu
    Constructs a new OptionsMenu with some top padding and a specific curser.

    R

    refreshContent(List<DataT>) - Method in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Updates the displayed list of data panels with new items.
    refreshView() - Method in class view.AbstractView
    Refreshes the view to reflect the current state of the observed data.
    refreshView() - Method in class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage
    Refreshes the view by setting the title label and regenerating all data panels.
    refreshView() - Method in class view.pages.ChecklistPage
    Refreshes the title and displayed tasks.
    refreshView() - Method in class view.panels.ChecklistPanel
    Refreshes the view to reflect the latest state of the observed checklist.
    refreshView() - Method in class view.panels.TaskCardPanel
    Refreshes all view elements to reflect the latest data in the observed task.
    refreshView() - Method in class view.panels.TaskTextPanel
    Updates the title label's style and tooltip based on the current task state.
    registerObserver(IObserver) - Method in class model.AbstractData
    Registers an observer to receive notifications of changes or events.
    registerObserver(IObserver) - Method in interface model.contracts.IObservable
    Registers an observer to receive notifications of changes or events.
    registerPage(JPanel) - Method in class controller.AppController
    Registers the given Panel as a page depending on its concrete type.
    remove(DataT) - Method in class model.AbstractCollection
    Removes an item from the collection and notifies observers.
    removeObserver(IObserver) - Method in class model.AbstractData
    Removes a registered observer so it will no longer receive notifications.
    removeObserver(IObserver) - Method in interface model.contracts.IObservable
    Removes a registered observer so it will no longer receive notifications.
    RenameDataDialog<DataT> - Class in view.dialogs
    Defines a dialog for renaming an AbstractData object.
    RenameDataDialog(DataT, JFrame) - Constructor for class view.dialogs.RenameDataDialog
    Constructs a new RenameDataDialog.
    run() - Method in class App
    Starts the application by applying UI configurations and showing the main workspace page.

    S

    saveWorkspaceData(Workspace) - Static method in class auxiliaries.JsonFileStorage
    Serializes the given Workspace into a JSON representation and writes it to the specified file path.
    setDeadline(LocalDate) - Method in class model.Task
    Sets the deadline of the task.
    setDetails(String) - Method in class model.Task
    Sets the description of the task.
    setDisplayMode(Checklist.DisplayMode) - Method in class model.Checklist
    Sets the display mode for the checklist.
    setMaximalInputLength(JTextComponent, int) - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Sets a key listener that restricts the maximal number of characters allowed in a text component.
    setObservedData(DataT) - Method in class view.AbstractView
    Sets the data object that this view will observe.
    setPriority(Task.Priority) - Method in class model.Task
    Sets the priority of the task.
    setSortMode(TaskSorter.Mode) - Method in class view.pages.ChecklistPage
    Updates the current sort mode and refreshes the list view.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class model.AbstractData
    Sets the title of this data object and notifies observers.
    showChecklistPage(Checklist) - Method in class controller.AppController
    Displays the checklist page in the main window and updates its contents.
    showWorkspacePage() - Method in class controller.AppController
    Displays the workspace page in the main window and updates its contents.

    T

    Task - Class in model
    Defines a single task, modelled with a title and additional details as well a completion status, priority, deadline and creation date.
    Task() - Constructor for class model.Task
    Creates an empty task with the current date as the creation date.
    Task(JSONObject) - Constructor for class model.Task
    Creates a task from a JSON object.
    Task.Priority - Enum Class in model
    Defines the priority levels a task can have.
    TaskCardPanel - Class in view.panels
    Defines a panel that visually represents a Task in the application.
    TaskCardPanel(Task, ChecklistPageController) - Constructor for class view.panels.TaskCardPanel
    Constructs a new TaskCardPanel.
    TaskSorter - Class in auxiliaries
    Utility class for sorting Task objects using various predefined modes.
    TaskSorter() - Constructor for class auxiliaries.TaskSorter
     
    TaskSorter.Mode - Enum Class in auxiliaries
    Enumeration of sorting modes for tasks.
    TaskTextPanel - Class in view.panels
    Defines a data panel for displaying a single Task as text.
    TaskTextPanel(Task, IDataPanelListener<Task>) - Constructor for class view.panels.TaskTextPanel
    Creates a new task text panel with the specified task and controller.
    TEXT - Enum constant in enum class model.Checklist.DisplayMode
     
    thisConfirmAction() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    Returns the Runnable action to be used when the Confirm button is pressed.
    thisConfirmAction() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Returns the Runnable action to be used when the Confirm button is pressed.
    thisConfirmAction() - Method in class view.dialogs.EditTaskDialog
    Returns the Runnable action to be used when the Confirm button is pressed.
    thisConfirmButtonText() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    Provides the label text displayed on the "Confirm" button.
    thisConfirmButtonText() - Method in class view.dialogs.ClearCollectionDialog
    Provides the label text displayed on the "Confirm" button.
    thisConfirmButtonText() - Method in class view.dialogs.CreateChecklistDialog
    Provides the label text displayed on the "Confirm" button.
    thisConfirmButtonText() - Method in class view.dialogs.CreateTaskDialog
    Provides the label text displayed on the "Confirm" button.
    thisConfirmButtonText() - Method in class view.dialogs.DeleteDataDialog
    Provides the label text displayed on the "Confirm" button.
    thisConfirmButtonText() - Method in class view.dialogs.EditTaskDialog
    Provides the label text displayed on the "Confirm" button.
    thisConfirmButtonText() - Method in class view.dialogs.RenameDataDialog
    Provides the label text displayed on the "Confirm" button.
    thisEditOptionText() - Method in class view.panels.AbstractDataPanel
    Provides the label text for the "Edit" option in the options menu.
    thisEditOptionText() - Method in class view.panels.ChecklistPanel
    Provides the label text for the "Edit" option in the options menu.
    thisEditOptionText() - Method in class view.panels.TaskCardPanel
    Provides the label text for the "Edit" option in the options menu.
    thisEditOptionText() - Method in class view.panels.TaskTextPanel
    Provides the label text for the "Edit" option in the options menu.
    thisTitleLabelText() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Provides the label text displayed before the title input.
    thisTitleLabelText() - Method in class view.dialogs.RenameDataDialog
    Provides the label text displayed before the title input.
    title - Variable in class model.AbstractData
    The title of the data object.
    titleInputField - Variable in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    The editable text field for the data's title.
    titleInputIsValid() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog
    Checks whether the current title input is valid.
    titleLabel - Variable in class view.AbstractView
    Label used to display a title or other brief textual information.
    toggleDisplayMode() - Method in class model.Checklist
    Toggles the checklist display between Checklist.DisplayMode.CARDS and Checklist.DisplayMode.TEXT.
    toggleDone() - Method in class model.Task
    Toggles the task's completion status.
    toJSON() - Method in class model.AbstractCollection
    Serializes the object into a JSONObject representation.
    toJSON() - Method in class model.Checklist
    Serializes this checklist into a JSON object.

    Serializes the object into a JSONObject representation.

    Serializes this task into a JSON object.

    view - package view
     
    view.contracts - package view.contracts
     
    view.controls - package view.controls
     
    view.dialogs - package view.dialogs
     
    view.pages - package view.pages

    W

    wasConfirmed - Variable in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    Flag indicating whether the user confirmed the dialog's action.
    wasConfirmed() - Method in class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog
    Determines whether the user confirmed the dialog's action.
    Workspace - Class in model
    Defines a workspace that maintains multiple Checklist items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
    Workspace() - Constructor for class model.Workspace
    Creates a new workspace with the default title "My Workspace".
    Workspace(JSONObject) - Constructor for class model.Workspace
    Creates a workspace from the JSON object.
    WorkspacePage - Class in view.pages
    Defines a page view that displays a Workspace and its associated list of Checklists.
    WorkspacePage(Workspace, WorkspacePageController) - Constructor for class view.pages.WorkspacePage
    Creates a new WorkspacePage bound to the given workspace data and controller.
    WorkspacePageController - Class in controller
    Controller for the workspace page in the ToDo Master application by implementing the IWorkspacePageListener interface.
    WorkspacePageController(AppController, Workspace) - Constructor for class controller.WorkspacePageController
    Constructs a new WorkspacePageController.
